panels.title: Span Duration by Service — p95
panels.description: Use TraceQL in Tempo to drill into specific correlation IDs. Filter by resource.service.name to isolate a single service.

options.content:
## Tracing a single flight

1. Fire a flight via the seed program or curl.
2. Copy the `correlation_id` from the logs.
3. In the **Trace Search** panel above, filter by that trace ID to see the full waterfall across all services.

Each span carries `flight.number` and `correlation.id` attributes so you can navigate:
- **Metrics → Traces**: use exemplars on the event rate panels (Event Chain dashboard)
- **Traces → Logs**: click a span, then "Logs for this span" to jump to Loki
- **Logs → Traces**: use `{app="flight-service"} | json | traceID != ""` in Loki

## TraceQL examples

```
# All spans for a specific flight
{ span.flight.number = "BA442" }

# Slow processing (> 100ms)
{ duration > 100ms }

# Errors only
{ status = error }
```
